T0543.title: Object Storage Bucket
T0543.definition: A logical container in cloud object storage used to hold files, snapshots, logs, and other unstructured data.
T0543.description: Object Storage Bucket is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0543.usageExample: Assess Object Storage Bucket related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
